titles.title: You'll Never Run Out of the Blood

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You may run low on money You may run short on faith You may feel so unworthy To even stop and pray You may feel your life's destroyed And you're running out of love Oh be strong, for you'll never Run out of the blood.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh it covers forever For the rest of our days And it places protection In the paths that we take And forever until these bones Return to the dust Oh my friend You'll never run out of the blood.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well I know that you struggle In your life everyday It seems all you've worked for Is being taken away And you're running Out of patience And you're running out of love Oh be strong for you'll never Run out of the blood.
